Financial Performance

Step-by-step savings calculation from historical benchmark to earned savings/losses.

Step Description Value MSSP Median Peer Median
1 Assigned Beneficiaries 13,642 p52 13,159 16,187
2 Historical Benchmark (per capita) $11,834 p59 $11,439 $11,692
3 Regional Adjustment +$585
4 Prior Savings Adjustment +$452
5 Adjustment Category Regional Adjustment
6 Updated Benchmark (per capita) $12,597 p35 $13,279 $13,026
7 Total Benchmark (all beneficiaries) $168,057,078
8 Total Expenditure (all beneficiaries) $153,745,232
9 Per Capita Expenditure (PY) $11,525 p25 $12,693 $12,883
10 Generated Savings / Losses $14,311,846 $6,931,306 —
11 Savings Rate 8.52% p83 4.21% 4.02%
12 Minimum Savings Rate (threshold) 1.00%
13 Guardrail Applied No
14 Final Shared Savings Rate 75.00%
15 Final Shared Loss Rate 40.00%
16 Earned Savings / Losses $10,519,207 $3,685,876 —
Revenue-to-Expense Category High Revenue

Risk Scores

Hierarchical Condition Category risk scores. A score of 1.0 = national average. Below 1.0 means the population is healthier than average.

CMS-HCC Risk Scores

Population Segment BY1BY2BY3PY Trend Coding Gap MSSP Med.
End-Stage Renal Disease (ESRD) 1.031 0.956 1.022 1.085 ↑ +0.091 0.967
Disabled 0.969 0.984 0.997 0.955 → -0.044 0.934
Aged, Dual-Eligible 1.029 0.946 0.966 0.970 ↓ -0.037 0.954
Aged, Non-Dual 0.963 0.984 0.975 0.983 → +0.006 0.983

Demographic Risk Scores

Demographic-only risk scores (age/sex/Medicaid status). Compared with HCC risk scores, the difference reflects clinical coding intensity.

Population Segment BY3PY
End-Stage Renal Disease (ESRD) 0.994 0.994
Disabled 1.006 0.999
Aged, Dual-Eligible 0.994 1.007
Aged, Non-Dual 0.977 0.977

Risk Redistribution Weights (PY)

Fraction of the ACO's total risk attributable to each population segment.

ESRD Weight 4.1%
Disabled Weight 9.9%
Aged Dual Weight 6.2%
Aged Non-Dual Weight 79.8%

Clinical Quality Measures

MSSP quality measures. Measures marked "lower is better" are inverted — a lower score indicates better performance.

Measure This ACO MSSP Median Peer Median
Overall Quality Score (Composite) p76 88.29 83.13 82.96
All-Cause Unplanned Admissions (risk-adjusted rate) (lower is better) ? p48 0.15 0.15 0.15

Peer Cohort

30 similar mid-size, ENHANCED-track, average acuity, rural infrastructure ACOs

View 30 peer ACOs
A4657A5094A5370A4776A3671A3633A2207A5025A3317A4711A2880A4652A4825A4998A4592A4830A5033A1095A3667A5226A1241A2710A5231A4988A5193A5364A4588A3016A2597A2600

Peers selected using weighted distance across 15 structural features (population acuity, composition, scale, care infrastructure, assignment type) within the ENHANCED track partition. Learn more

Methodology

Data source: MSSP ACO Performance PY2024 (dataset ID: mssp-performance). Vintage: PY2024. Downloaded: 2026-04-12. Rows in source: 476.

MSSP ACO Performance reports financial and quality performance for Accountable Care Organizations participating in the Medicare Shared Savings Program. Savings/losses are calculated against risk-adjusted, regionally-weighted benchmarks.

Full methodology →

MIT License. Free. No ads. No login.
GitHub · Report an error
